extract: Pecharunt (Japanese: モモワロウ Momowarou) is a dual-type Poison/Ghost Mythical Pokémon introduced during Generation IX, in The Indigo Disk. It is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon. Pecharunt is the leader of the Loyal Three, and it is associated with Ogerpon. It is also the last Pokémon in the Blueberry Pokédex.
